query:
UPDATE musicVideoJobs SET status = 'failed', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id = 540002;
UPDATE musicVideoScenes SET status = 'failed', updatedAt = NOW() WHERE jobId = 540002 AND status IN ('pending', 'generating');
